xuecheng-plus-parent/pom.xml.general_idea: Revert maven-compiler-plugin source and target settings from 21 to 1.8 to match the project's declared Java version property.
xuecheng-plus-parent/pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation failure or mismatched bytecode version if the plugin targets JDK 21 while the project properties and dependencies are configured for JDK 1.8.
